Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: PURPOSE: Open the SO picker card. Stores callbackScript in shared state, injects HTML into $$SO_PICKER_HTML, then opens the SO__SOPicker card window. The web viewer self-starts via tryFetchPage().

Step.name: Insert Text
Step.Text: PARAMS: none — reads callbackScript from Globals::ServiceOrderSelector.callbackScript (caller must set this before calling SO__OpenSOPicker)

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: MARK: Inject picker HTML into global — layout web viewer reads $$SO_PICKER_HTML as its URL

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: MARK: Open card window — web viewer reads $$SO_PICKER_HTML as its URL formula
